note: Additive to global-core.json. Compiled from published reference lists (multiple search passes) -- not yet confirmed via an actual live submission.

directories.name: 192.com
directories.note: high authority, deeply embedded in UK local search per research

directories.name: Yalwa UK / Locanto
directories.note: Yalwa rebranded to Locanto in the UK market per research

directories.name: Opendi UK
directories.note: verify URL/signup flow before relying on it

directories.name: Fyple UK
directories.note: strong usability for small-business self-managed listings per research

directories.name: Brownbook
directories.note: already in global-core -- listed here as a reminder it has strong UK coverage specifically (2.2M+ UK businesses per research)

research_note: ~200 general UK listing sites exist per research, plus niche/specialist directories (professional bodies, chambers of commerce, networking groups) that are genuinely industry-specific rather than general-purpose. General search is now surfacing repeats rather than new names -- further growth needs either a real delivered report or working through full paginated lists this session can't fetch directly.
